title: Pageable Trait Parameters
description: Controls pagination behavior in list and collection views.

defaultPageSize.description: Default number of items per page.

pageSizeOptions.description: Available page size choices displayed as a dropdown. Must be sorted ascending.

showPageSizeSelector.description: Whether to display the page size dropdown selector.

showGotoPage.description: Whether to display a go-to-page input for direct page navigation.

showItemRange.description: Whether to display the item range indicator (e.g., Showing 26-50 of 312).
